profile.name: Mustafa Kamal
profile.headline: PCB Design & |Power Electronics
profile.bio: MSc at Coventry University. Specialist in Altium Designer, high-current PCB design, motor drivers, inverters, and battery systems. Available for freelance projects.
profile.pills: *Altium Designer,*Power Electronics,Motor Drivers,Battery / BMS,IoT Hardware,LTspice,FPGA Design

projects.title: 3-Phase Inverter for BLDC Motor
projects.desc: Full hardware design for Shell Eco-marathon. MOSFET selection, gate drivers, DC bus, current sensing, overcurrent and thermal protection. Validated 120° phase-displaced waveforms on oscilloscope.

projects.title: 37V–42V 15A Battery Pack
projects.desc: High-current Li-ion pack for Shell Eco-marathon. Cell layout, spot welding, BMS integration, balancing, over/under-voltage and short-circuit protection.

projects.title: Raspberry Pi Extension Board
projects.desc: Custom extension board with dual BNO055 IMU, PA1010D GPS, 6 GPIO LEDs, LM317 LDO regulator, and XL4015 DC-DC converter from 12V input.

projects.title: USB 2.0 Hub
projects.desc: 4-port hub using TUSB2046IBVFR. Impedance-controlled USB differential pair routing, ESD protection on all ports, multi-peripheral power distribution.

projects.title: Custom ESP32 Development Board
projects.desc: USB-to-UART connectivity, power regulation, GPIO breakout. Designed following Robert Feranec methodology. Full bring-up and testing completed.

projects.title: 3W RGB LED Driver Board
projects.desc: Constant-current PWM driver for high-power RGB LEDs. Switching circuitry optimised for low losses, smooth colour transitions, thermal management.

projects.title: 5V Relay Control Board
projects.desc: Transistor driver and flyback diode enabling MCU control of 12V relay. Status LEDs, safe high/low voltage interfacing for competition vehicle.

projects.title: 220V AC to 48V DC Converter
projects.desc: First Altium Designer PCB sent to production. AC-DC step-down with high-voltage clearances and safety spacing. Full design-to-manufacture cycle.

ongoing.title: Custom FPGA Development Board
ongoing.desc: Designing a custom Xilinx-based PCB for signal processing and DSP applications. Board includes power regulation, JTAG programming interface, clock distribution, and I/O headers — fully designed in Altium Designer.

skills.name: Power design
skills.items: DC-DC converters,AC-DC supplies,Motor drivers,Battery / BMS,MOSFET circuits
